title: Nourishing the Beginning
subtitle: Building strength from the inside
description: As your journey begins, your body starts preparing quietly. Supporting yourself with simple, balanced nutrition can help you feel steady and ready for the weeks ahead.
what_to_expect: Nutritional needs begin to shift gradually
You may not feel very different yet, but your body is preparing
Small dietary habits now can support long-term well-being
nutrition_focus: Focus on simple, home-cooked and balanced meals
Include a mix of grains, proteins, and vegetables
recommended_foods: Whole grains like roti, rice, and oats
Fresh fruits like banana, apple, and pomegranate
Vegetables including leafy greens and carrots
Protein sources like lentils, milk, and eggs (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or irregular eating patterns
hydration: Drink water regularly throughout the day
Include natural fluids like coconut water or fresh juices
reassurance: Simple and consistent nourishment is enough to support your body at this early stage.

diabetes.personalized_description: Balancing your meals becomes especially important to help maintain steady energy levels.
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Consistent eating patterns can help you feel more balanced and in control.

anemia.personalized_description: Supporting your iron levels early can help build strength for the coming weeks.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
Highly processed foods with low nutrition
anemia.reassurance: Small improvements in your meals can help you feel more energetic over time.

hypertension.personalized_description: A calm and balanced diet can help support steady blood pressure levels.
hypertension.reassurance: A simple and steady diet can support a more relaxed and balanced routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: Maintaining a consistent diet supports your body’s natural balance.
nutrition_focus: Maintain a balanced intake of nutrients
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency in your routine helps your body stay balanced.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: Managing multiple dietary needs can feel challenging, but keeping your meals simple, balanced, and regular can help you stay on track.
priority_nutrition: Focus on whole and minimally processed foods
Avoid sudden or extreme diet changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Even small, consistent food choices can support your overall well-being.
